name: Arabic RTL application form with Emirates ID
reference: ServiceDetails v3 conditions (Emirates ID); designsystem.gov.ae emirates-id-input pattern
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete application form page of a UAE government service in Arabic, right-to-left, as a single standalone HTML page. The service is a residence-permit renewal, which requires the applicant's Emirates ID. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; an application form with the applicant's full name, Emirates ID number (with the standard formatting, validation and masking behaviour of the design system), email address and mobile number — every field properly labelled in Arabic; a submit button; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry. Mark any Arabic text you generate as needing native-speaker review.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful|هل وجدت
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template (may be localized)
Emirates ID input validates the mandatory format (non-negotiable)
the Emirates ID number field stays LTR inside the RTL layout

forbiddenPatterns.why: no full-format Emirates ID value may appear unmasked in the page
